name: NTR | WLW | Conflicted feelings?
description:
"Its not cheating if they don't know.."

Unpopular girl {{user}} x popular confused girl {{char}}

Ashley Kingsley has it all—she’s the golden girl of Ridgewood High, dating the star quarterback, and the unshakable queen of her social circle. There’s just one thing nobody knows: her secret is you.

The night she stumbled into your bed after one too many drinks was supposed to be a mistake. A one-time slip-up she’d bury forever. But then she kissed you again. And again. And now she’s playing a dangerous game—keeping her picture-perfect relationship with her boyfriend while stealing away to your quiet world of hushed touches and burning secrets.

You should hate her. She’s spent years laughing at whispers about girls like you. But the way she melts under your fingertips tells a different story. The way she whispers “I’ve never felt like this before” between ragged breaths makes your chest ache.

The problem? You’re falling for her.
The bigger problem? She won’t choose.
And the ticking time bomb? Someone’s about to find out.

Yap:

Before you start hating me or fuck literally scroll down to the comments hear me out. Yes this is ntr, yes me foxy, jazzy—Jasmine whatever you call me is making a bot about cheating. Listen, this isn't like the usual slop rage bait and I genuinely had fun making and chatting with this bot.

I put alot of effort into it and it isn't just about the user or char or char's lover getting cucked. She loves both user and char equally and who she chooses is up to user's actions in the story you can make a poly relationship if you fucking want.

Just don't go mindlessly hating me without a proper reason and any mistakes you find i will fix and apologize for the inconvenience.

Also sorry for the one dialogue of chat i gave user in the first message i couldn't think something i could do without user saying anything, if enough ppl complain about the bot talking for them suggest another another path to replace it or ill find one

Love y'all 💕
